name: Picnic Dip
directions: Mix ketchup, Mustard and Sour Cream in a bowl, then slowly add, a teaspoon at a time, the Horseradish until you get the right amount of heat for your taste.
Remember, cooking is a creative sport.
This mixture will be still enough to use as a dip for chips, and it is also very good on hot dogs.

name: Multi purpose BBQ marinade
directions: Crush Garlic.
Mix together.
Apply marinade to Fish, Beef or Pork fillets and leave in fridge for 30 minutes.
When grilling baste with leftover marinade.

similar.name: A Different Sweet and Sour Marinade

name: Balsamic Vinaigrette
directions: Combine ingredients.
Refrigerate overnight.
Of course this is better with all fresh ingredients, but I've made it plenty of times with dried herbs, chicken bullion broth, and packaged lemon juice and it still tastes good.
I prefer to serve this over Boston lettuce, with some other greens.
Discard after 3 days, unless you enjoy botulism.

name: Drew's Marinade and Tenderizer
directions: Add all ingredients, except baking soda, and mix.
Add baking soda and mix.
It will begin to froth, and that's normal.
Place meat (beef, chicken, pork, venison) in resealable plastic bag and refrigerate for 20 minutes up to several hours.
Grill or stir-fry meats.
Note: Do not leave meat in marinade overnight, as it will soften and flavor meats too much.

name: Thai Influenced Marinade
directions: Combine in bowl or zip lock bag.
For fish and produce, a 15 minute marinade is good.
Allow 1-3 hours for individual steaks and chicken breasts, and up to eight hours for a whole chicken or big steak (like London Broil).

name: Spring Salad
directions: Combine lettuce, spinach and cabbage in a large salad bowl.
Arrange oranges along inside rim of bowl.
Place strawberries and kiwi on top of the oranges.
Cover with onion rings.
Add dressing to salad.
Cover and refrigerate.
Toss before serving.

name: Basic Vinaigrette
directions: Whisk everything except lemon juice in a small bowl, just until thickened.
Add lemon juice& whisk again.
You can substitute red or white wine for the vinegar.
You can substitute another juice, like orange, or lime, for the lemon juice.
Just make sure you use fresh squeezed, or the results will be a little flavourless.
You may substitute another fresh herb for the parsley.
Vegetable seasoning salt, like Herbamare Original Aromatic Sea Salts, give the dressing a more complex flavour, instead of a salty flavour.
Real, crispy bacon, and a little of the fat makes a nice dressing for non-vegetarians.

name: Garlic Vinaigrette
directions: Blanch garlic cloves in salted, boiling water for four minutes, then peel& puree.
(Or you could try using roasted garlic- just make sure you don't boil it!) Whisk everything except lemon juice together until thick.
Add lemon juice, and whisk again.
You can use a different mustard base, like honey mustard, or a spicy raspberry mustard.
You can use red or white wine in place of the vinegar.
You can also use a different juice, in place of the lemon, like orange, or lime.

name: Lemon Vinaigrette
directions: Whisk everything except sour cream together in a small bowl until well-mixed.
Add sour cream& whisk again.
Try using lime juice.
Lime works well with a lot of Latin American food, since lemons are hard to come by in Mexico, Central& South America.
Also, you may substitute another hot sauce for the Tabasco.
There are actually a few other Tabasco sauces that may work well.
There is a Chipotle Tabasco sauce, and another that comes in a green bottle, which is quite good as well.
Experiment with these.
Chipotle Tabasco with a Lime Vinaigrette would be expecially tasty, in my opinion.

name: Spicy Barbecue Sauce
directions: Whisk ketchup, onion, Worcestershire, mustard, molasses, maple syrup, vinegar, chili powder, and cayenne in small bowl.
Simmer sauce over medium heat, stirring frequently with heatproof spatula, until the sauce is thick and glossy and spatula leaves clear trail in sauce, about 4 minutes.

name: Crazy Lemon Marinade
directions: If using fresh basil, cut into thin strips.
Mix all ingredients.

To use: Pour about 1/2 of the marinade over 2 pounds of pork chops or chicken breasts, cover& refrigerate at least 1 hour but no more than 2 hours; this reserves 1/2 of the marinade for a basting sauce while cooking.

name: Avocado Soup
directions: Combine avocados, jalapeno pepper, garlic, lime juice, sherry, and chicken broth in a blender and puree.
Stir in cream and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Chill until ready to serve.
Garnish with fresh parsley.

name: Oregano Dill Dip
directions: Combine all ingredients until smooth.
Chill for two hours before serving.

similar.name: Copycat Tastefully Simple - Garlic Garlic Dip

name: Knock off Chipotle Guacamole
directions: After peeling avocados take core out and set aside.
Place the insides of the avocado in a bowl.
Take a potato masher and mash the avocados until it is a creamy consistency.
Add, onion, cilantro, jalapeño, and spices over the avocado mixture.
Stir the ingredients and then add juice from half of a lime.
Stir and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Note- to keep guacamole from turning brown add the cores that you set aside back in the bowl and place on top of the guacamole.
For some reason this will keep it fresh for a longer period of time.

name: "soup" Er No Peel Potatoes
directions: Mix water, soup mix, margarine, and pepper; stir well.
Place potatoes in a greased 2 quart casserole dish.
Pour water mixture over potatoes; covering potatoes well.
Bake at 350°, covered, for about 2hours, or until potatoes are tender.
Stir occasionally.
Uncover and sprinkle parsely over potatoes for last 30 minutes of baking to brown potatoes.
NOTE: I have used more pepper than called for, and I have halved this with no problems.
It may not take the full 2 hours to cook.

similar.name: Potatoes and Onions Baked in Broth

name: Three Chili Salsa With Avocado
directions: Note: My wife and I like hot food so we double the number of chilis used.
Prepare the ingredients seperately.
Mix all ingredients into bowl or container.
Squeeze lemon into the container.
Let salsa sit in refrigerator for minimum 2 hours in order for flavors to blend.

name: Creamy Tomato Soup
directions: In a medium pot, heat the milk over moderate heat.
Put the crushed tomatoes in a food processor and process until smooth.
Pour the processed tomatoes into the milk and stir to combine.
Put the chopped onion, garlic, celery, stewed tomatoes, tomato paste, flour, sugar, salt and pepper into the processor and process until the mixture is a smooth grind.
Pour this mixture into the milk mixture and stir to combine.
Bring the soup to a boil and then reduce the heat and simmer for 15 minutes.

name: Spicy Honey Butter
directions: In small bowl, beat together all ingredients.
Serve immediately or cover tightly and refrigerate.

similar.name: Mustard and Honey Butter ( for Damper )

name: Raspberry Vinaigrette
directions: Combine ingredients in a jar and shake well.

name: Easy Tasty Cucumber Salad
directions: Peel the cucumber and slice it thinly.
In a bowl, combine the mayonnaise, vinegar and sour cream. Whip to blend well. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Add the cucumbers and toss well to coat.
Cover and refrigerate, overnight is best for the best flavor.

name: Easiest Fruit Dip Ever
directions: Mix together and chill in the fridge for at least 2 hours.
Note that other pudding flavours may be substituted.

name: Corn Salad
directions: drain corn.
put in large bowl, add rest of ingredients.
stir well.
ready to eat but is best when set so that the flavors has time to marinate together.
good by itself or at a bbq.

name: Mock Honey Garlic Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a bowl. Whisk to makes sure there aren't any lumps of sugar.
Pour over meats in a 9x13 casserole.
Bake in a 350 degree oven for an hour or until sauce is nice and gooey.
Enjoy!

name: Fish Marinade
directions: Mix all ingredients well and marinate fish one to four hours in the refrigerator. Drain marinade and broil or barbecue fish.
Preparation time does not include marinate time.

similar.name: Fish Marinade for People Who Hate Fish

name: Grandma's Roasted Potato Salad
directions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.

Mix 6 tablespoons of olive oil, the garlic, salt, pepper and herbs. Add potatoes and toss. Spread out onto a baking sheet and bake for 50 minutes, stirring occasionally. When potatoes are golden brown remove the pan from the oven and let cool. When potatoes are cool, place them in a bowl and scrape the pan drippings into a measuring cup. Add enough oil to the drippings to measure 6 tablespoons of oil. Whisk the vinegar and mustard in a small bowl. Gradually add the oil and then mix in the onions. Pour the dressing over the potatoes and combine. Season with salt and pepper, if needed. Add chopped basil. Let stand for 1 hour at room temperature. Serve.

name: Smooth & Simple Guacamole
directions: Dump all ingredients into a food processor (or blender) and blend until smooth and creamy.  Adjust seasoning, if needed.
Refrigerate in a covered container.  Chill for at least 1 hour before serving.

name: A Different Sweet and Sour Marinade
directions: Just mix ingredients well and add your choice of meat. Marinate at least 30 mins but overnight increases the taste.
Enjoy.

name: Lee's Potato Salad
directions: Boil Potatoes until just done.
Drain well.
While potatoes are still hot, pour Garlic Expressions over them and toss lightly.
Add onions, parsley and seasionings and lightly toss again.
Add mayonnaise and mix.
Refrigerate.

name: Worlds's Easiest and Possibly Best Guacamole
directions: Peel and mash avocados.

Stir in salsa.  The guacamole should be green with hints of the red from the salsa about a tablespoon per avocado--the salsa shouldn't overpower the guacamole.  (In California, fresh homestyle salsa was easy to find--now that we live out of state, I use mild Pace Picante).
Add a few shakes of garlic salt (the garlic should be evident without being overpowering--I taste as I go).
Mix together and serve.  Should be prepared as close to serving as possible.  Guacamole will turn brown and separate if made too far ahead of time.

COOL TIP: To keep Guacamole fresh and avoid browning, place avocado pit in the bowl until ready to serve! Use as a dip with tortilla chips. Spoon generously on burritos (a great way to use leftover roast beef, pork or chicken). We love it on cheese omelettes as well.  My kids pile it on top of quesadillas.  I read once that Avocados are the most nutrition dense food on the planet.  They are rich in mono-saturated fat (the good kind that breaks down cholesterol) as well as vitamin E--ENJOY!

name: Browned Potatoes With Roast
directions: Parboil potatoes in salted water until slightly soft, about 7-10 minutes.  Don't let them get too soft.
Spray with Pam, or mix with a little oil.
Place around the beef or pork roast about one hour before serving dinner.
After 30 minutes, turn the potatoes once, if you want them browned on both sides (optional).

similar.name: Potatoes and Onions Baked in Broth

name: Beer Basting/Marinade
directions: Mix together till sugar is dissolved.
Baste meat while grilling or use as marinade.
For best flavour marinade overnight in fridge.
Prep time does not include the time it takes to marinade.

similar.name: A Different Sweet and Sour Marinade

name: No Sodium Oven Fries
directions: Preheat oven to 400° F, 200° C or Gas Mark 6.

Place minced garlic into microwave safe bowl and add oil. Microwave for 1 to 2 minutes, depending on power of microwave, you are only heating the oil and garlic to blend and intensify, not cooking anything.
When oil is cool enough to touch, add potatoes to bowl and toss to coat well.
Spread out on small sheet pan or in small roaster that has been well greased or sprayed with no stick spray.
Place on top rack of oven and cook for 20-25 minutes.
Begin checking for browness at 20 minutes. When brown, turn potatoes and cook for same length of time on other side or until brown.
Remove from oven and serve as is, or sprinkle with your favorite no sodium seasoning mix.

similar.name: Potatoes and Onions Baked in Broth

name: Pasta Toss With a Kick
directions: Finely chop Jalapeno,onion,garlic.
saute above with olive oil until soft,translucent.
Add can tomatoes,wine and sugar.
Simmer  on low for 15 minutes.
Add oregano and Basil simmer another 5 minute.
Toss sauce over cooked pasta
garnish with Parsley and cheese.
Serve with good italian bread-.

name: Oil and Vinegar Marinade
directions: Combine all ingredients; stir well. Marinate your choice of meat, for at least 30 minutes, the longer you marinate the better.

similar.name: Fish Marinade for People Who Hate Fish

name: The Best , Fast, and Easiest Salad You Will Ever Eat....
directions: Chop the romaine hearts the way you desire.
Cut the Avacado half into little chunky pieces.
Top with the Feta cheese and the walnuts.
This salad is great with Balsamic vinegar and olive oil -- .

name: Garlic Lime Soup
directions: Saute garlic in oil SLOWLY til very soft and golden.
Add broth, bring to a simmer, add lime juice and cilantro.
Garnish with a few whole cilantro leaves.
Obviously this can be played with--I've tossed in chopped avocado, crushed tortilla chips, chopped tomato, etc.  But the basic simplicity is its beauty.

name: Curried Dip
directions: Combine all ingredients; stir well.
Store  covered in fridge.
Serve with fresh veggies.

name: Fragrant Honey Marinade
directions: Mix everything together.
Chuck it over something.

name: Dill Sour Cream Sauce
directions: Stir mayo and sour cream in small bowl until blended.
Add dill, mustard, garlic, and pepper until well blended.
Cover and refrigerate up to 1 day.

name: Cucumber Tomato Salad With Heat
directions: Mix together the following ingredients: Cucumber, tomato, onion, garlic, peppers, and dill.
Spash over and mix in: vinegar, lemon juice, olive oil and salt.
Refrigerate for an hour before serving.

name: French Fry Sauce
directions: Mix and you're done!

I usually don't measure the ingredients. To make a big batch, I just add Mayo to the Ketchup bottle until it looks like the right color and tastes good, then add the vinegar until it is smooth and it tastes right. I always encourage people to play with your food!

name: Cool and Creamy Cucumber Salad
directions: Place the sliced cucumbers in a colander and lightly toss with the kosher salt.  Place over a bowl to drain.
After the cucumbers have drained for at least 1/2 hour, rinse and drain.
Put cucumbers in bowl and add the onions, yogurt, mayo and salt and pepper.
Stir together and place in a bowl in the refrigerator for 2 hours.
Serve.

name: Salsa Texas Style
directions: Grill all the vegetables whole and unpeeled (I use charcoal and mesquite wood chunks. Soak the chunks for 1 hour if possible). You Can use raw vegetables also or a gas grill, but you loose some flavor that way. And I call that cheating.
Next, in a food processor chop onions, garlic and jalepenos (I make mine almost like a puree but a little chunkier).
Add a lime and 1/2 the chicken broth to the mix and transfer it to a large sauce pan on med-low heat.
Puree all the tomatoes and add to the other ingredients in the sauce pan.
Add the spices, limes and lemons (taste after each add to find your sweet spot. We like ours very bold here).
Last, add the cilantro (again to your taste), remaining chicken broth and more salt if needed.
Let it simmer 5-10 minutes to incorporate all the flavors and spices.
Its Great with corn chips or add to any salsa freindly dish.

name: Fresh Simple Guacamole
directions: Halve avocados lengthwise around pit.
Remove pit with a large spoon, then scoop out flesh into a bowl.
Squeeze the lemon juice into bowl.
Add tomato, onion, and jalapeno, and mash guacamole with a fork to desired consistency.
Season guacamole with salt, to taste.

similar.name: Worlds's Easiest and Possibly Best Guacamole

name: Oriental Vegetable Dip
directions: Mix together.
Chill and serve with raw fresh vegetables.
Very good with celery, mushrooms, carrots and cauliflower.
You may need to thin it with 2 tsp of milk after chilling.

similar.name: Copycat Tastefully Simple - Garlic Garlic Dip

name: Honey Almond Butter
directions: In a small mixing bowl, beat butter, honey, brown sugar and extract until light and fluffy.
Transfer to a sheet of plastic wrap; roll into a log.
Refrigerate until chilled. Unwrap and slice or place on a butter dish.

similar.name: Mustard and Honey Butter ( for Damper )

name: Fruit Dip
directions: In a medium bowl with an electric mixer, mix the cream cheese, ginger, marshmallow cream, and orange juice. (At first it will be hard to combine but will loosen because of the acid in the orange juice.)
Once completely combined and smooth, chill for at least 30 minutes.
Serve with favorite fruits and canned fruits work well too.

name: Cream of Broccoli Soup
directions: In a large saucepan, mix and bring to boil broth and soup.
When it is boiling, add broccoli and bring to second boil.
Reduce heat.
Cover and simmer for about 5 minutes, or until broccoli is cooked.
In medium skillet, heat butter and sautee onions for about 5 minutes, or until tender.
Add the flour and cook for about 1 minute longer.  If necessary, use whisk to remove lumps.
Slowly stir milk into flour mixture in skillet.
Cook, until thickened, stirring constantly.  It will take about 5 minutes, then add salt and pepper.
Mix well.
Stir milk mixture into broccoli mixture and simmer over low heat for about 10 minutes.
Stir frequently.
Ladle into bowls and top with grated cheese.

name: Parsley & Lime Salad
directions: Put everthing into a bowl and toss well.

name: Tomato Salad
directions: Slice tomato
Crumble feta cheese over tomato.
Sprinkle basil over all.

similar.name: The Best , Fast, and Easiest Salad You Will Ever Eat....

name: Herb Butter
directions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl.

name: Quick Great  Guacamole Recipe
directions: Smush the avocados and put into serving bowl.
Add chopped onions and diced tomatoes.
Pour the garlic powder, lemon juice, and the hot sauce.
Mix it all together and grab a chip and enjoy.

similar.name: Worlds's Easiest and Possibly Best Guacamole

name: Strawberry Romaine Salad
directions: Two hours prior to serving, mix mayo, sugar, vinegar and refrigerate.
When ready to serve, tears romaine leaves into fork size pieces.
Slice onion into thin slices and separte into individual rings. Halve rings.
Toss lettuce, strawberries and red onion with refrigerated mix. Bon appetit!

similar.name: The Best , Fast, and Easiest Salad You Will Ever Eat....

name: Farm Potato Salad
directions: Mash potatoes until creamy.
Add bacon and pickles and stir into potato mixture.
Serve! Yum!

name: Mayo-Mustard Mix (Port of Subs Copycat)
directions: Mix together well.
Place in plastic container.
Store in fridge.

name: Creamy Cucumber Salad
directions: Place cucumbers in a colander and toss with salt. Let stand until several tablespoons of liquid has drained, 30-45 minutes.
Pat dry with paper towels and transfer to a medium bowl.
Add onion, sour cream, vinegar, dill (or its substitute), pepper and sugar. Toss to coat.
Taste.
A little more sugar? Decide.
Serve and garnish with a little paprika. Serve well chilled, on chilled plates, over a bed of greens or kale, with a lemon or orange twist for presentation.

name: Really Good Salsa
directions: Drain tomatoes and reserve liquid.
Chop tomatoes into desired size pieces.
Put tomatoes and reserved liquid into small sauce pan.
Add all other ingredients.
Cook over low heat to blend flavors.
Cool and refrigerate.
Serve with a good restaurant-style corn chip.

name: Curry-Honey Vegetable Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients together and chill for at least 2 hours before serving.
Serve with fresh vegetables.

name: Herb's Herb Butter
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Chill until ready to serve.
It should be used within a week and kept refrigerated, or you can freeze it and saw off a hunk when needed.

name: Steak Marinade My Way
directions: This recipe is best if you beat the steaks and stab it a few times with a fork so the juice can soak into the meat.
Mix Italian dressing and Worcestershire sauce.  This is the main thing--if you would like to add more or less of either, just make sure the Worcestershire isn't overpowering the Italian dressing.

Add minced onion, garlic powder, seasoned salt and pepper to tastes.  I usually use at least a shake or two from each bottle, a little lighter on the salt and pepper then the other two, but its not a science in the recipe, just go with your tastes.
Marinate!

similar.name: Sarasota's Favorite Simple Fresh Chicken Marinade

name: Garlic Compound Butter
directions: Put all ingredients in a stand mixer with a wire whip attachment and whip until butter is lighter in color and the volume has increased.
Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.

Or, dish it out on parchment paper and roll into a log.  Wrap in plastic wrap and foil and it can be frozen for months.  Best part is you can just unwrap and slice off what you need and rewrap it and stick it back in the freezer.

name: Garlic Lime Tartar Sauce
directions: Whisk the mayonnaise until smooth and creamy, and set aside.
Combine remaining ingredients and mix together until well incorporated.
Stir into mayonnaise, and whisk until well combined.
Chill for 30 minutes before using.

name: Curry Mayonnaise
directions: Stir together until all ingredients are incorporated.
Chill 15 minutes.

name: Chipotle Mayonnaise
directions: Place all ingredients into bowl of food processor. Process until smooth and well blended. Keep refrigerated.

name: Mustard Dip
directions: Dump all ingredients in a bowl and whip with a wire whisk.
Refrigerate for several hours before serving.
Contains mayonnaise. Refrigerate leftovers.

name: Honey Dijon Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Chill.
Serve.

name: Mr. Jim's Salsa
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Serve chilled.
Note:  Best when allowed to chill a couple of hours.

name: Honey Mustard Glaze
directions: Bring first 4 ingredients to a boil.
In a cup combine cornstarch with water until smooth.
Gradually add to honey mixture and bring to a boil.
Boil 1 minute, stirring constantly.

name: Horseradish Sour Cream
directions: Combine sour cream, prepared horseradish and a drizzle of olive oil in a small bowl and mix until thoroughly combined.
Season with salt and pepper.

name: Easy Pan Roasted Potatoes
directions: Peel potatoes and cut into 1.5in even pieces.
Place potatoes in a frying pan.
Pour over 100ml of water.
Place over high heat until all the water has gone.
Lower the heat to minimum. Add lard.
Cook gently, stirring occasionally for 30min or until the potatoes are the colour you like (golden brown in this house!).

similar.name: Potatoes and Onions Baked in Broth

name: Quick Tomato Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients, Simmer in a pot at least 30 minute
The longer you simmer the better it is. I usually simmer at least 1 hour.
Cook's Note: Sauce can be made ahead of time and kept covered in the refrigerator for up to 3 days or frozen for up to 3 months.

name: Honey Mustard Sauce
directions: Combine ingredients and store in a dispensing container.
Keep refrigerated.

name: Christina's Fresh Salsa
directions: Dice the tomatoes (Plese use a knife and cutting board, if you use a food processor it cuts them to fine and you will have salsa soup).

Dice the red onion and jalepeno(s) adjust to taste, if you like it spicy add the seeds and use 2, if you like a mild salsa scrape out the seeds and don't use them -- we add 2 peppers seeds and all, we love it spicy!
Finely Chop up the Fresh Cilantro, stems and all, measure out a cup. *This is a loose measurement, if you want more or less, you can add it, this is a recipe to taste*.
Add the tomatoes, onions, cilantro and jalepenos to a bowl, add salt and the fresh ground black pepper to taste. Add in the freshly squeezed lime juice and stir.
Taste it and see if it is the way you like it, if it needs more of anything add it -- if you want it hotter still add some hot sauce, a couple of drops at a time.
Once it is hot, salty or sour enough, stir well and put in the fridge untill ready to serve.

name: Christina's Fresh Guacamole
directions: Mash up avacados in a bowl, make them as smooth or as chunky as you like. (We like it fairly chunky).
Peel and dice red onion.
Chop up fresh Cilantro, stems and all.
Dice jalepeno(s), de-seed if desired *Remember that the seeds give more heat* I leave them in because we love our mexican food spicy!
Add everything into a large bowl and stir, add in salt and freshly ground black pepper to tase, add the juice of the two limes.

Stir to combine, taste to see if it is hot, salty or sour enough, adjust to your taste, if you want more heat add the hot sauce -- once it is to your liking cover with plastic wrap and put in the fridge untill you are ready to serve.
This goes well with my salsa recipe, and tastes great with tacos, burrito's, nachos, tortilla chips or even carrot and celery sticks.

name: Easy Marinara Sauce
directions: Add olive oil to hot sauce pan.
Add garlic and cook for a minute (don't let garlic burn).
Add tomatoes, sugar, oregano, and basil.
If desired, add meatballs.
Bring sauce to a boil.  Cover and simmer the sauce for 10-20 minutes or until desired thickness.
Serve with desired pasta.

name: Tomato Florentine Soup With Pasta
directions: Combine tomatoes, water, onion powder, basil, carrot, onion, bouillon cubes and salt (if using)in a large soup pot.
Bring to a boil.  Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered for 10 or 15 minutes.
Add pasta.  Simmer, covered,  about 15 minutes longer or until pasta is tender.
Stir in spinach.  Heat through.
Serve with grated Parmesan cheese if desired.

name: Fish Marinade for People Who Hate Fish
directions: Whisk all ingredients together and pour over whichever fish you choose.  I put the fish and marinade in a Ziplock and store it in the fridge.
Leave to marinate for one hour.
Cook fish however you prefer but baking is great.

name: Parsley Ranch Dip
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a food processor. (You can also mince the herbs by hand and then mix the ingredients with a fork.)
Cover and chill the dip in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour.
Serve with cucumber, carrots, green beans, sugar snap peas, jicama, or tortilla chips.

similar.name: Copycat Tastefully Simple - Garlic Garlic Dip

name: Honey Mustard Dipping Sauce
directions: Whisk all ingredients together.
Refrigerate for an hour.
Keeps for one week or more.

name: Black Olive Relish Dip
directions: Chop green onions and tomatoes by hand.
Chop olives, jalapeno and garlic in food processor.
Mix with the onions and tomatoes.
Let stand 3-4 hours before serving.
Drain juice.
Add the olive oil and vinegar and stir and serve.

name: Mustard and Honey Butter ( for Damper )
directions: Place all ingredients in a mixing bowl and cream all ingredients with an electric mixer until combined.

name: Easy Green Chilli Relish
directions: Sauté the onion in the oil.
Add the remaining ingredients and warm through.

name: Cocktail Sauce (Shrimp or Any Seafood)
directions: Mix all the ingredients together and chill.

name: Salsa for One or Two
directions: Place onion and jalepeno into food processor and pulse until blended well.
Add tomatoes, pulse until blended well.
Add cilantro, pulse until blended.
Add seasonings if you prefer. I just put in a dash of garlic powder and cumin and pulse it one or two more times.

name: Fruit Dip
directions: Beat all ingredients.
Serve with favorite fruit.

name: Light Cream of Broccoli Soup
directions: In a food processor puree 1 cup steamed broccoli, garlic, and 1/4 cup chicken broth.
In a large saucepan over medium heat, melt the margarine. Add the flour, and stir until mixture thickens and starts to brown.

Slowly add remaining 1 cup chicken broth and milk, stirring often. Allow mixture to thicken, about 5 minutes. Then add the puree mixture and the remaining 1 1/2 cups steamed broccoli. Heat through, and allow to thicken for about 5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
You can also just puree the entire soup in the pot with a immersion blender, and allow soup to thicken.

name: Anna's Salsa W/ Avocado
directions: In blender, pulse the tomatoes for 2-3 seconds, pour in serving bowl (you don't want it to be runny).
Add all other ingredients.
Stir well.
Place in refrigerator for 30 minutes to marry flavor.
Serve.

name: Honey Garlic Marinade
directions: In a large glass bowl or shallow dish, whisk together marinade.  Add 4 servings (1 lb boneless or 2 lb bone-in) food; cover and refrigerate for 4 hrs, or 30 minutes for fish.  Makes about 1/3 cup.

similar.name: A Different Sweet and Sour Marinade

name: Potatoes and Onions Baked in Broth
directions: 9 13 inch baking pan, place all ingredients in pan and cover.  Bake at 350 for 1 hour.  Serves 6.

name: Guacamole
directions: Mash avocados with a fork.
Mix in remaining ingredients.
Enjoy!

name: Ginger and Lemon Marinade
directions: Mix all the ingredients in a small saucepan over moderate heat and stir until the butter is melted, or use the microwave.
Marinate seafood or meat 30 minutes to 2 hours (any more and the lemon starts to "cook" the meat.
Baste with marinade while cooking.

name: BBQ Sauce
directions: mix together.

name: Jalapeno Potato Salad
directions: Cook unpeeled red potatoes for 15-20 minutes.
Cool.
Cube potatoes.
Gently combine all ingredients in large bowl.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.

name: Lexington BBQ Dip (Less Sugar)
directions: Bring to a slow boil in a non-reactive pan for 10 minutes.  Mop on your bbq meat or use it as a dip.

similar.name: A Different Sweet and Sour Marinade

name: Honey Thyme Mustard
directions: Whisk together all ingredients in small bowl until well blended.
Transfer mixture to airtight container and refrigerate until ready to use.

name: Salsa Fabuloso!!!
directions: MIX all ingredients WITH EXCEPTION of water in large bowl.
Once all ingredients are incorporated, add 1/3 of batch to blender.
Blend on "chop" setting for 5 seconds.
Add water for desired consistency, & blend for 1-2 seconds more, (some like it thick-some don't, you may also blend for a longer period of time if salsa is chunkier than you prefer).
Pour salsa into empty bowl & continue on until all ingredients have been blended.
Store in air tight container for up to 2 weeks, or freeze unused portion.

name: Mango Tomato Salsa
directions: Mix all the ingredients and enjoy.
You could refrigerate it for a while or could use it right away depending on how you like it.
You could try using vinegar or lemon juice instead of lime juice.

name: Rotel Salsa
directions: Mix and enjoy.
To increase heat, add canned or fresh jalapenos to taste.

name: Lorilyn's Spaghetti Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in dutch oven or large soup pot.
Bring to a low boil, reduce heat, cover & simmer for 35-40 minutes.
Add extra water if necessary to achieve the desired thickness.
I added fully cooked meatballs at the last 5 minutes of simmering & served over cooked spaghetti noodles.

name: Garlic Soup
directions: In a large pan, saute onions and garlic in butter until tender, about 2-3 minutes.  Stir in flour until blended.  Gradually add broth.  Bring to a boil; cook and stir for 2 minutes or until thickened.  Reduce heat; simmer, uncovered, for 15 minutes.  Stir in cayenne.

name: Abc Noodle Soup
directions: In a large stockpot, saute the onions in the vegetable oil over medium heat until translucent (about 5 to 8 minutes).  Add the carrots and chicken stock, cover the pot, and bring to a boil.  Reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes.  Add the celery and simmer for another 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Turn off the heat and stir in the pasta.  Cover the pot and let sit for 20 minutes.

name: Lovely Lady Salad
directions: Cut of the ends of of the lettuce. Wash them and the tomatos and the onion. Dry all and then throw into a bowl. Add small pieces of chesse, carrots, brocolli and cucumbers (optional). Add your favorite dressing to it and wah la you have salad.

name: Grilled Lemon Chicken Marinade - Ina Garten
directions: Whisk together the lemon juice, olive oil, salt, pepper, and thyme.
Pour over the chicken breasts in a nonreactive bowl.
Cover and marinate in the refrigerator for 6 hours or overnight.

similar.name: Sarasota's Favorite Simple Fresh Chicken Marinade

name: Fiesta Salad
directions: Combine the first six ingredients.
In a small bowl, mix the salsa, sour cream, and ranch dressing.  Pour over the salad and toss to coat.
Serve immediately.

name: Tartar Sauce
directions: Mix together mayonnaise, mustard, pepper, salt, and pickle relish.
Grind together onions, parsley, and capers. You can use a hand blender or a food processor.
Add to the mayonnaise mixture and mix well.  Refrigerate until ready to use.

name: Vegetable Dip
directions: Combine all ingredients. Stir well.
Chill 3 hours.
Serve with fresh vegetables.

similar.name: Copycat Tastefully Simple - Garlic Garlic Dip

name: Mc Donald's Honey Mustard Sauce
directions: Mix.
Refrigerate covered. Use within 1 month.

name: Roast Potatoes
directions: peel and cut potato's into in halves or quarters.
Place prepared potato's  in a large saucepan of water.
Add stock cubes.
Par boil the potatoes.
Drain well add the potatoes to a roasting pan.
With a folk fluff the top of the potato's along the top and crossways.
Add ground sea salt.
Add oil (drizzle across potatoes) and roast until golden and crisp.

similar.name: Potatoes and Onions Baked in Broth

name: Nice'n  Spicy Barbecue Sauce
directions: In saucepan saute onions in butter  until tender.
Stir in remaining ingredients;  simmer for about 5 to 10 minutes.
If you want a hotter sauce, you can add more hot sauce.
Makes about 3 1/2 cups.

name: Macaroni Salad
directions: Cook macaroni in boiling water and salt in large uncovered pot for 5 to 7 minutes, stirring occasionally until tender but firm. Drain. Rinse under cold water. Drain and put into a large bowl.
Add next 7 ingredients and toss.
Combine the next 5 ingredients in a small bowl then pour over macaroni mixture and toss until well coated.

name: Copycat Tastefully Simple - Garlic Garlic Dip
directions: The orginal recipe called for 3 tablespoons, each, of the dry ingredients.
Mix everything together and chill for one hour before serving.

name: Honey Mustard Sauce :)
directions: Mix well.
Add a little more honey or mustard according to taste if needed.
Chill until thickened if you'd like.

name: Super Easy Tomato Soup
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Bring soup to a boil.
Turn heat to low after soup boils and let simmer for 5 minutes.
Serve and enjoy.

name: Creamy Garlic and Horseradish Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients; adjust amounts to taste.  For baking with meat, sprinkle with panko breadcrumbs.

name: Sara's Simple Garlic Butter
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a small bowl, and store, covered, in the fridge until needed.

name: Honey Butter Spread
directions: Place butter and honey in a small mixing bowl.
With a hand-held mixer, beat at low speed until well-combined and creamy in texture.
With a rubber spatula, scrape butter out of mixing bowl into a serving bowl.  Serve at room temperature.

similar.name: Mustard and Honey Butter ( for Damper )

name: "souped Up" Veggie Dip
directions: Mix together and dip dip dip!

name: Chili Sauce Dip
directions: Combine all ingredients and chill.
Serve with veggies.

name: Bloomin' Onion Dipping Sauce
directions: Mix it all together and enjoy as a dip for onions or french fries, or as a sandwich spread.

name: Caper Mayonnaise (For Seafood or Vegetables)
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Refrigerate at least half an hour before serving.
Serve with Salmon (Grilled in white wine marinade) or asparagus or whatever!

name: Avocado Salsa
directions: mash the avocados, leaving small chunks.
add remaining ingredients, and mix together.
let sit in the refrigerator for 1 to 2 hours uncovered.

name: Potato Filling
directions: Prepare the potatoes.
Fry the bread, onions, salt and pepper in olive oil until brown and crispy.
Stir bread mixture into potatoes.
Add turkey drippings until smooth.
Bake in 350 degree oven for 30 minutes.  If you make it a day ahead, bake for 45 minutes.  The top should be crispy.
It makes great leftovers!

similar.name: Potatoes and Onions Baked in Broth

name: Easy Grill Marinade
directions: Mix all of the ingredients together and marinate your grilling choice in a large glass container.
Cover and put in the refrigerator. The longer you marinate, the deeper the flavors. I usually marinate overnight.
Have fun grilling!

name: Savory Tomato Soup
directions: Cook celery and onion in butter till tender but not brown.
Blend in flour.
Add remaining ingredients, except bacon; cook and stir until slightly thick.
Reduce heat; cook slowly 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Garnish with bacon.

name: Chili-Spice Rub With Orange
directions: Combine everything in a food processor or blender and purée.
Rub over the surface of your vegetables or other food and slow-grill over medium-low heat.

name: Super Easy Pizza Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients and refridgerate for at least an hour.

name: Dill and Horseradish Mayonnaise
directions: Mix all together.
Season to taste.
Serve with salad.

name: Salsa-Tex-Mex Style
directions: First blend the cilantro, onion, jalapeno and garlic clove in a couple ounces of water. Add the Rotel and canned tomatoes and continue to blend. Finally, add the rest of ingredients and keep adjusting the seasonings to your liking.
After all the ingredients are blended, pour into a saucepan and let it come to slow boil. This will blend the flavors of each ingredients.
Refrigerate. Goes well with white corn tortilla chips.

name: Fresh and Easy Tomato Sauce
directions: Heat stock pot on med-low.  Add some EVOO to lightly lightly lightly coat the pan. More so you can saute your veggies.
Cut your veggies and add them as you go along but add the garlic last so it does not burn.
Add Salt To your veggies for flavor and to get them working faster.
Add your cans of crushed tomatoes and bay leaves.
Let this mixture cook for an hour, remove your bay leaves and your sauce is ready to serve.

You can use the sauce you need for your meal tonight and freeze the rest for later. That is why the servings are all crazy and I'm sorry if you can't monitor exactly what you are eating because of it.

name: Sarasota's Favorite Simple Fresh Chicken Marinade
directions: Seasoning  --  Just mix in all in a large baggie, toss well and add the chicken. Any type of chicken will work, boneless skinless, thighs, wings, drumettes, bone in breasts, even quarters. Also pork chops, tenderloins, or just even cubes of chicken or pork for kabobs.

Of course cubes or thinner cuts will take shorter to marinade, whereas  --  larger cuts such as bone in breasts will take longer to marinate.  Just enjoy, it is just a nice fresh taste and works great.

similar.name: Grilled Lemon Chicken Marinade - Ina Garten

name: Cinnamon Butter Spread
directions: Mix all ingredients in a mixing bowl until creamy.

similar.name: Mustard and Honey Butter ( for Damper )

name: Sweet and Tangy Tartar Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together in small bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and let stand to blend flavors, about 15 minutes. Stir again before serving.

name: Vegetable Sweet Sauce
directions: After butter has melted, add other ingredients, mix well & pour over vegetables. I usually marinate for at least 15 minutes & then grill basting occasionally until done.

name: Garlic Butter
directions: Make sure the butter is relatively soft.
Mix in the garlic cloves.
Add dried herbs of your choice, if you wish.
Put in an air tight container and ideally leave a day before using so that the garlic flavor really permeates the butter.

name: Garlic Avocado Dip
directions: Cut avocados and remove the pit and the skin.
Place all ingredients in a food processor and blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Copycat Tastefully Simple - Garlic Garlic Dip

name: Honey Mustard Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small bowl; mix well.
Serve with warm or hot appetizers.
Refrigerate any leftovers promptly.

name: Gotta Love It Marinara Sauce
directions: Blend all ingredients in blender or food processor until smooth.
In a large skillet over medium heat, simmer for 30 minutes (stir occasionally).
Yields approximately 5 cups.

name: Cucumber Raw Mango Salad
directions: Mix all ingredients in a serving bowl.
Freeze and serve.

name: Zesty BBQ Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl and stir well.
ENOJY!

name: 30 Second Steak Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together. Serve.

name: Simply Delicious Fruit Dip
directions: Mix marshmellow crème, sour cream and vanilla pudding together until well mixed.  Then fold in cool whip.  Chill until served.

name: Chunky Guacamole Salad
directions: Peel avocadoes, cut into small chunks.
Chop tomatoes into small chunks.
Chop onions finely.
Mix in bowl with vinegar, oregano and garlic.

Just before serving, add in small chunks of feta, as much as you like (I do this at the very end as the salty cheese draws out the moisture from the tomatoes and you don't want your salad to get soggy).

name: Balsamic Beef Marinade
directions: Mix all ingredients.
Marinate beef 8 hours.

name: Fabulous Cream of Mushroom Soup
directions: Melt margarine in a dutch oven on the stovetop.  Add the onions and mushrooms and saute until the onions are at the desired texture.
In a separate bowl.  Combine the soups and mix until smooth.
Add the soup mixture to the mushrooms & onions in the dutch oven.  Simmer for 30 minutes.

name: Simple Tomato Soup
directions: In a blender, process tomatoes with juices until pureed; set aside.
In a large saucepan, heat butter over medium-high-heat. Add onion; cook and stir until tender. Add garlic; cook 1 minute longer.
Remove from the heat; stir in flour until smooth. Cook for 1 minute.
Gradually whisk in broth.
Add pureed tomatoes; bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat and simmer for 20-25 minutes to allow flavors to blend.

name: Tomato Salad With Balsamic Vinegar
directions: You can substitute fresh basil & oregano with a 1/2 teaspoon dried.
Place the tomatoes & chopped veggies in a large bowl. Add the olive oil, vinegar, garlic, and herbs (if using). Toss well.
Transfer to a serving dish and finish with freshly ground black pepper & salt to taste.

name: Super Quick Chip Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients in a small bowl.
Taste it, and adjust garlic and Worcestershire sauce as needed.

Serve with potato chips. Note: I usually use MUCH more garlic powder and W. sauce, because as I said, I love garlic.  Please feel free to adjust the amounts to suit your taste because honestly I just guessed at all this, having never measured anything for it before.

similar.name: Copycat Tastefully Simple - Garlic Garlic Dip

name: Creamy Tomato Soup
directions: In a saucepan, combine the first four ingredients. Bring to a simmer over medium heat. Gradually stir in milk; cook and stir until heated through (do not boil). Yield: 2 servings.

name: Classic Ranch Dressing
directions: Measure, Mix, then Shake to mix well.

name: Dill Dip
directions: Mix sour cream, mayo, dill weed & onion flakes together in a large bowl.
Then add season salt to taste.
Refrigerate for 1 hour then serve with potato chips.
Note 1: You must be careful with the season salt because when the dip is chilled the flavor becomes much stronger.
Note 2: You can double or triple the recipe to make bigger batches of dill dip.

similar.name: Copycat Tastefully Simple - Garlic Garlic Dip

name: Grilled Chicken Marinade
directions: Pour olive oil into a 2-cup liquid measuring cup.

Mix together salt, pepper, paprika, cumin, and cayenne pepper and add to olive oil. Add garlic, onions, and parsley. Mix together well with a fork. Slowly add beer as it will cause the mixture to foam and bubble slightly.
Pour marinade over the chicken in the zip top bag. Remove as much air as possible from the bag and seal. Turn the bag from side to side to make sure all chicken has been coated with the marinade.

Place the bag flat on a small, rimmed kitchen sheet pan and into the refrigerator. Allow to sit up to 1 hour or overnight for best results, turning the bag over every few hours to keep the chicken coated.

similar.name: Grilled Lemon Chicken Marinade - Ina Garten
Sarasota's Favorite Simple Fresh Chicken Marinade

name: 4 Ingredient Easy Chicken Marinade
directions: Add ingredients into a bowl.
Whisk.
Marinate your chicken in it.
That's it!
There's no reason to continue reading!
